Nîmes

Oslo

The green house, garden and bikes.
4guests
2bedrooms
2terraces
✓air conditioning
+ 1 photos

Oslo is the townhouse just as we love them: a colourful, bohemian living room opening at ground level onto an enclosed garden, a brimming bookcase, and the easy charm of a neighbourhood home.

Air-conditioned, with bikes available, a few minutes’ walk from the station, it is perfect for a family wanting room to breathe while staying close to the centre.
